content:
Hi #connection

🚨 Hiring Alert | Legal Associate (Freshers Welcome) 🚨
We are looking for enthusiastic and detail-oriented Legal Associates to join our team.
📌 Position: Legal Associate
📌 Qualification: LLB (Mandatory)
📌 Experience: Freshers with internship experience in Document Review and/or Cyber Incident-related work can apply
📌 Locations: Mohali, Gurgaon, Noida, Delhi
📌 CTC: Up to ₹5 LPA
📌 Employment Type: Contractual role for 3 months, with the possibility of conversion to a permanent position based on performance
If you're looking to kick-start your legal career and gain hands-on experience in a dynamic work environment, we'd love to hear from you!
📧 Interested candidates can share their CV at: puja.dasadastraconsultants@gmail.com
Please like, comment, and share this post to help us reach suitable candidates. 🙌
#Hiring #LegalAssociate #LegalJobs #LLBJobs #FreshersHiring #DocumentReview #CyberIncident #LegalCareer #MohaliJobs #GurgaonJobs #NoidaJobs #DelhiJobs #JobOpening #CareerOpportunity
comment: 3-month contract roles in doc review/cyber often hinge on throughput and accuracy benchmarks early on; clarity on evaluation metrics upfront helps reduce mismatch and drop-offs
